reason: Reflect/Proxy implementations moved out of exec/call.zig still reuse the shared call dispatcher helpers
Reflect argument-list rooting reuses the exec ValueSliceRoot helper
Reflect.apply/set delegate callable checks and the qjs reflect-set path to the exec call runtime
Reflect.construct reuses exec construction paths for WeakRef and typed arrays
Reflect host entry points share the exec HostError error set
Reflect entry points thread the exec VM globals slots through call helpers
Proxy has-trap validation reuses exec proxy trap helpers
Reflect property entry points reuse the exec property-key atom conversion
Reflect.construct argument coercion reuses exec value conversion helpers
